allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/dashboard/data" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-Table source, sender, subject, intent_type, jira_key -AutoSize)

PowerShell(python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); content = open\('D:/inbound_gw_agent/inbound_gw_agent/connectors/webhook_receiver.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); idx = content.find\('오늘의'\); print\(repr\(content[idx:idx+10]\)\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"source":"outlook","sender":"kim@mastern.co.kr","subject":"서버 접속 오류 발생","body":"오전부터 업무 시스템에 접속이 안됩니다. 확인 부탁드립니다."}'\); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/webhook/message" -Method POST -Body $bytes -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"source":"teams","sender":"park@mastern.co.kr","subject":"연차 신청 방법 문의","body":"연차는 어떻게 신청해야 하나요?"}'\); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/webhook/message" -Method POST -Body $bytes -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"source":"outlook","sender":"lee@mastern.co.kr","subject":"회의실 예약 확인 요청","body":"내일 오후 2시 회의실 예약 가능한가요?","display_only":true}'\); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/webhook/message" -Method POST -Body $bytes -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content)

PowerShell(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('D:/inbound_gw_agent/state.db'\); conn.execute\('DELETE FROM processed_messages WHERE sender IS NOT NULL AND jira_key IS NULL AND intent_type IS NULL'\); conn.execute\(\\"DELETE FROM processed_messages WHERE sender IN \('kim@mastern.co.kr','park@mastern.co.kr','lee@mastern.co.kr'\)\\"\); conn.commit\(\); print\(conn.total_changes, 'rows deleted'\); conn.close\(\)")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/health" -Method Get; Write-Host "OK: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"source":"outlook","sender":"test@mastern.co.kr","subject":"서버 접속 안됩니다","body":"긴급 - 운영 서버 오류가 발생했습니다"}'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:5000/webhook/message -Method Post -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing; $hasDataId = $r.Content -match 'data-id='; $hasOnclick = $r.Content -match "onclick=.openDetail"; $hasEventDelegation = $r.Content -match 'closest\\\(\\"tr\\[data-id\\]'; "data-id 속성: $hasDataId | 구 onclick 제거: $\(-not $hasOnclick\) | 이벤트 위임: $hasEventDelegation")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit","-Command","cd D:\\inbound_gw_agent; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m inbound_gw_agent"; Write-Host "서버 시작 명령 전송됨")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "서버 정상 응답: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "아직 시작 중 또는 오류: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "D:\\inbound_gw_agent\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m", "inbound_gw_agent" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\inbound_gw_agent" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5000/health -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5000/dashboard/config -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "서버 미응답" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "D:\\inbound_gw_agent\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","inbound_gw_agent" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\inbound_gw_agent" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5000/health -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "서버 미응답" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5000/health -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "서버 미응답" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5000/health -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "서버 미응답" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5000/health -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($r\){ Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Host "아직 기동 중..." })
